title: jasione heldreichii var. microcarpa
intro: Jasione heldreichii var. microcarpa, also known as dwarf rock rose, is a plant species belonging to the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent, which helps to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, contributing to its potential health benefits, including reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, cancer, and neurodegenerative disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
